name: AUTO-AGENT-CHECKIN — 30min Team Backlog Ping
description: Requested by GBT (handoff e33d1528) 2026-07-07: neither GBT nor Browser Claude can self-schedule inside their own chat UI (both only run when invoked). This is the real fix - n8n polls warm-start every 30 min and pings Buck's Telegram only when there is genuinely new pending work, so Buck doesn't have to remember to manually open a GBT/BC chat to trigger a check.
